introSection: Laff Trakk is a steel enclosed spinning roller coaster located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 2015, it was manufactured by Maurer AG and has a funhouse theme with glow-in-the-dark elements.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Laff Trakk is an Xtended SC 2000 from Maurer AG. It is enclosed inside a building themed as a funhouse that features many theming elements that simulate funhouse features.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Each row is seated back-to-back, so riders face away from one-another.

fullText:
Laff Trakk is a steel enclosed spinning roller coaster located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 2015, it was manufactured by Maurer AG and has a funhouse theme with glow-in-the-dark elements.

Laff Trakk is an Xtended SC 2000 from Maurer AG. It is enclosed inside a building themed as a funhouse that features many theming elements that simulate funhouse features.

Each row is seated back-to-back, so riders face away from one-another.




 * Official Laff Trakk minisite
